word: H4998 - נָאָה - nâʼâh - naw-aw' - Be beautiful

sections.paragraph:
Original: נאה

Transliteration: nâ'âh

Phonetic: naw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be comely, be beautiful, be befitting
    1. (Pilpel)
      1. to be comely
      2. to be befitting

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1271

Part(s) of speech: Verb
